full_text:
Tan Zheng 譚正
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tan Zheng (譚正). General who Pacifies the North. Captured by Wang Ji. Tan Zheng was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
